name: Keith R. Holdaway
title: A synopsis of my 24 years fighting sarcoma
body: I was diagnosed in 2002 and given 6 months to live. I have been treated at DUMC, and now I attend UPenn in Philadelphia. I have 2 amputations: right arm (2010) and left leg (2024). I live a happy and fulfilled life. Reach out at 919 699 7627
